steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$13x=112-x$$Graph or solve it directly and read the x-value that works. The requested value is $8$.

steps.title: Gather the $x$ terms
steps.content: Start with $$13x=112-x.$$ Add $x$ to both sides so all $x$ terms are on one side: $$14x=112.$$
